'''wahufu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:huddle|huddle]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-h-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:huddle|huddle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| wahufu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæhifith|wæhifith]] || [[word:wæhifij|wæhifij]] || [[word:wæhifish|wæhifish]] || [[word:wæhifi|wæhifi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wahuhufuth|wahuhufuth]] || [[word:wahuhufuj|wahuhufuj]] || [[word:wahuhufush|wahuhufush]] || [[word:wahuhufu|wahuhufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wahufuth|wahufuth]] || [[word:wahufuj|wahufuj]] || [[word:wahufush|wahufush]] || [[word:wahufu|wahufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wahuffuth|wahuffuth]] || [[word:wahuffuj|wahuffuj]] || [[word:wahuffush|wahuffush]] || [[word:wahuffuf|wahuffuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wahufuthu|wahufuthu]] || [[word:wahufuju|wahufuju]] || [[word:wahufushu|wahufushu]] || [[word:wahufuku|wahufuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wahufuth|wahufuth]] || [[word:wahufuj|wahufuj]] || [[word:wahufush|wahufush]] || [[word:wahufu|wahufu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wahufuthul|wahufuthul]] || [[word:wahufujul|wahufujul]] || [[word:wahufushul|wahufushul]] || [[word:wahufukul|wahufukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wahufuthuthu|wahufuthuthu]] || [[word:wahufujuju|wahufujuju]] || [[word:wahufushushu|wahufushushu]] || [[word:wahufuku|wahufuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wahufuthun|wahufuthun]] || [[word:wahufujun|wahufujun]] || [[word:wahufushun|wahufushun]] || [[word:wahufukun|wahufukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wahufuthuoro|wahufuthuoro]] || [[word:wahufujuoro|wahufujuoro]] || [[word:wahufushuoro|wahufushuoro]] || [[word:wahufukuoro|wahufukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
